Integrations

Connect your tools

Send click events from Snipr to Slack, Zapier, Google Analytics, and more in real time.

Slack

Send click notifications to your Slack channels instantly.

Zapier

Trigger Zapier workflows on every link click — connect to 5,000+ apps.

Google Analytics

Send click events to GA4 via Measurement Protocol — including UTM data.

Custom Webhook

Fire a signed HTTP POST to any endpoint on every link click.

Segment

Send Snipr click events to Segment and route them to any downstream tool.
